Reset
SDA <- Z
SCL <- Z

RMACK <- 8'bX
RIUSE <- 8'b0
RNEEDA <- 8'b0
RBYTEA <- 8'b0
RSACK <- 8'd1
BUFFSEND <- 8'bX
BUFFRECEIVE <- 8'bX
